duplicateIdentifierChecks.tlua(3,5): error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'value'.
duplicateIdentifierChecks.tlua(4,5): error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'value'.
duplicateIdentifierChecks.tlua(8,5): error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'value'.
duplicateIdentifierChecks.tlua(9,5): error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'value'.


==== duplicateIdentifierChecks.tlua (4 errors) ====
    // Retain duplicate-member coverage without the removed class and accessor syntax.
    interface DuplicateProperties {
        value: number;
        ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'value'.
        value: number;
        ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'value'.
    }
    
    interface PropertyAndMethod {
        value: number;
        ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'value'.
        value(): number;
        ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'value'.
    }
